shared_properties: The overlay covers the full 1920x1080 frame and uses monochrome values that preserve the project palette contract.
The effect is authored as a screen-space texture so weather readability does not depend on runtime shader variance.
The center zone remains readable enough for queue and village inspection while edges close in with snow pressure.
differences: This mask creates the heavy edge whitening described for late winter and major storm situations.
Peripheral opacity ramps inward more aggressively on the left and right edges to reinforce tunnel vision.
Sparse horizontal noise bands imply moving snow walls without turning the image into flat white.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the winter survival loop, queue-memory mechanic, building roster, and 1920x1080 Bevy target.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the monochrome blizzard mood, Viking settlement silhouettes, and snow density targets.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_village_scene
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the settlement composition, building spacing, and whiteout layering over the frozen basin.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Full-screen SpriteBundle overlay rendered between world layers and the top HUD to simulate whiteout pressure.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/art_000007.png at boot and fade its alpha in or out according to storm severity thresholds.
runtime_notes: Render the mask after village layers and weather particles so the player still sees flakes through the whitening effect.
Animate opacity through ECS values rather than swapping textures to keep transitions smooth.
Clamp the center safe area so critical queue and status text remains readable at high severity.

context.usage: Peripheral whiteout mask used when blizzard intensity narrows vision and stresses the memory mechanic.

shape.silhouette: Full-screen snow-ring mask with a clear center window and dense edge whitening.

acceptance_criteria: PNG canvas is exactly 1920x1080px with a centered readable window for primary gameplay information.
Edge whitening is visibly stronger in the outer 25 percent of the frame than in the middle zone.
Noise bands do not create hard geometric edges that could be mistaken for interactable objects.
